name: Spring Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Mixed green and yellow beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Top and tail the beans.
2. Cook in lightly salted boiling water for 3 to 5 minutes or until tender crisp. Drain and refresh under cold running water.
3. Add potatoes to boiling salted water. Cook gently for 15 minutes or until tender. Drain.
4. Peel and chop carrots, then add to a saucepan with enough cold water to cover. Salt lightly, bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until tender. Drain.
5. Add corn and peas to small amounts of lightly salted boiling water. Cook for 3 to 5 minutes. Drain.
6. Peel and seed tomatoes, then cut into small dice.
7. Place beans, corn, and peas on tea towel to drain while preparing dressing.
8. In a bowl, whisk together egg yolks, Dijon mustard, salt, pepper, shallots, lemon juice, honey, mint, and parsley until well combined.
9. Gradually add oil, drop by drop, beating continuously until the mixture thickens.
10. Add remaining oil in a slow, steady stream, continuing to beat. If needed, thin with up to 2 tablespoons of lemon juice until desired thickness is reached.
11. Adjust seasoning as necessary.
12. Arrange vegetables on one large platter or individual plates and garnish with egg wedges.
13. Thin the mayonnaise with boiling water if needed before lightly coating the salad. Leftover dressing can be refrigerated for up to 1 week.
